mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM event
AND category = #{category}
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY event_date, event_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO event (name, category, top_n, event_date, event_time, location, status) VALUES (#{name}, #{category}, #{topN}, #{eventDate}, #{eventTime}, #{location}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM event WHERE status = #{status}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM registration WHERE event_id = #{eventId}
SELECT * FROM event WHERE status = 0 ORDER BY event_date, event_time LIMIT #{limit}
